title: Bounce Idol Effects
prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 sprite sheet for top-down survivor idol follow-up effects. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate isolated effect sprites on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between subjects. No scene, no floor, no text, no UI. These are gameplay effect sprites, not UI icons. Keep them compact, readable, and punchy with thick silhouettes and strong color identity. Layout: top-left Idol_Electric, a sharp lightning strike burst suitable for a stun and chain hit. Top-right Idol_Ice, a cold crystalline burst suitable for a freeze or chill proc. Bottom-left Idol_Shadow, a dark slash or void burst suitable for a shadow chain hit. Bottom-right Idol_Star, a radiant star spark burst suitable for a ricochet impact. Each subject should be centered, isolated, and ready to crop into a single effect sprite.
